health_conditions: thyroid cancer (single cancerous nodule, others benign)

benefits.description: Reports feeling better after total thyroidectomy in February; using levothyroxine 100mcg daily

protocol_notes: Had total thyroidectomy in February due to cancerous thyroid. Given all clear post-surgery (only one cancerous nodule). Now using Ostarine, BPC-157, Tirzepatide, and Retatrutide post-recovery. Takes levothyroxine 100mcg every morning. Notes Tirzepatide is not typically recommended with hypothyroidism but considers himself safe as thyroid is removed and levels are medicated. Based in UK (NHS). Advises OP to get thyroid sorted before using peptides.
